programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test
programme.desc: A new chapter begins as India, under captain Shubman Gill, takes on England in a five-match series. Both teams will aim to start their World Test Championship cycle strongly with key players like Joe Root and Jasprit Bumrah ready to fire.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 1
programme.desc: Following England's spectacular final-day chase in the first Test, Shubman Gill's India will be eager to level the series at Edgbaston.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 2
programme.desc: England and India return to Edgbaston after their infamous 2022 Test, where the home side chased down a target of 378 runs in the final innings.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 3
programme.desc: England has only won two of their last five Tests at Edgbaston. The third day against India begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 4
programme.desc: In India's previous eight visits to Edgbaston for a Test, they've failed to register a win. Day four begins.

programme.title: T20 Blast: Sussex v Hampshire
programme.desc: Hampshire's experienced duo James Vince and James Fuller face a Sussex attack led by Nathan McAndrew and left-armer Tymal Mills.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 5
programme.desc: The second Test between England and India concludes from Edgbaston.

programme.title: Test Mini ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 5
